notes: Sluggish main menu with music glitches, generally worse performance than Windows 10, and crashed when exit from practice with Ferrari 440 (I think?) on Paul Ricard.
title: Assetto Corsa Competizione

notes:
After the Early Access, the game has now a lot of new content. The game works "out of the box" but has a problem with videos that are not shown .This videos are placed in the installation folder as a WMV format. In career mode, when you start, the game shows a black screen when is suppose that there be a video, and you can't continue. The rest of the modes seems to work correctly. The performance is not good but is playable. Take a look to this video I recorded: https://youtu.be/UZHq0QuC-K0
https://youtu.be/UZHq0QuC-K0
title: Assetto Corsa Competizione

notes: No menu sound or engine sounds, no intro movies, career mode wont start because of black screen other modes like Championship, Events and Multiplayer seem to work, but havent tried an online race yet. Was able to get sounds once when using the 3.16 Beta but then stopped again. Might try reinstalling or some of the Proton Launch Commands.
title: Assetto Corsa Competizione

notes: Runs perfectly now, all the sound issues are fixed for me and performance is good. Videos don't play but that doesn't really matter.
title: Assetto Corsa Competizione
